name: YouTube innertube API (undocumented)
applicability: Undocumented internal YouTube API used to fetch captions without API key. ANDROID client context bypasses some restrictions. This is how the library works — and it's the approach T27 should use for caption extraction.
home_connection: T27 — caption extraction without API key

name: youtube-transcript-api Python package
applicability: The package itself. pip install youtube-transcript-api. One-line transcript fetch with language selection, translation, SRT/WebVTT output. THE caption-first tool for T27.

name: defusedxml safe XML parsing
applicability: Safe XML parsing that prevents XXE attacks. Used for parsing YouTube transcript XML. Pattern for any XML processing in agent tools.
home_connection: Security pattern — safe XML parsing for any content extraction

name: Webshare rotating residential proxies
applicability: 30M+ residential IP pool for rotating proxies. Recommended by the library for working around YouTube IP bans. Commercial service ($). Only needed for high-volume extraction.
home_connection: T27 — IP ban workaround for bulk extraction

name: README IP ban workaround guide
applicability: Practical guide to handling YouTube IP blocks: proxy config, Webshare setup, retry strategies. Operational knowledge for T27 bulk extraction.

name: README formatter examples
applicability: 5 output formats: JSON, text, SRT, WebVTT, pretty-print. SRT and WebVTT are standard subtitle formats usable by video players and NLP tools.
